name: TextField
summary: MUI TextField in the Jedi system. Always paired with a real `<label>` (MUI does this for you when you pass `label`). Validation runs on blur; error state pairs `error.main` with a helper message (never color alone).

anatomy.description: 1px border in `other.outlined-border-23-p` (outlined variant); thicker `primary.main` on focus.

states.name: error
states.description: Outline + helper in `error.dark` (light) / `error.light` (dark); inline icon required.

states.name: disabled
states.description: Color & outline use `action.disabled`; never custom opacity.

a11y: Every input has an associated label — pass `label`, do not rely on placeholder.
Error state pairs color with a written error message; never use color alone.
Validate on blur, never per keystroke.
Failed form submissions preserve every field value (loss aversion).

examples.label: Outlined with helper
Error with inline icon

doNot: Drop the label and rely on a placeholder.
Use `error.main` for the helper text (3.6:1 fails AA) — use `error.dark` or the 160p/190p tint recipe.
Wipe entered values on a failed submit.
Disable a field via `opacity: 0.5` or a custom grey.
